top_signals.title: Germany’s Reiche Tells EU to Avoid Harming Exports to China
top_signals.summary: German Economy Minister Katherina Reiche said the European Union should ensure that any measures it applies on Chinese trade don’t harm the bloc’s exports to the country.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Investor Powerlaw to Debut on Nasdaq as IPO Race Heats Up
top_signals.summary: Powerlaw Corp., a closed-end fund that owns stakes in Elon Musk’s SpaceX and artificial intelligence firm OpenAI, is going public without raising any capital in the latest public vehicle to cater to retail investors’ clamor for exposure to the hottest private tech companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Piper Sandler says Strait of Hormuz to remain closed for months and oil to hit new highs
top_signals.summary: Prolonged closure of Strait of Hormuz could send crude oil prices to new highs this summer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: AutoZone stock has worst day in four years, despite retailer beating Wall Street estimates
top_signals.summary: Concerns include international growth and margin compression as well as pressures from inflation, energy costs and potential supply chain disruptions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: SpaceX-Tesla merger chatter reignites as Musk pushes rocket company towards Nasdaq
top_signals.summary: With SpaceX headed for the public markets next month, industry experts and people close to Elon Musk are speculating about a potential tie-up with Tesla.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin drops to 13th largest asset as capital flees to AI and precious metals
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Zambia State Mining Firm Strikes Lime Deal With Chinese Operator
top_signals.summary: Zambia’s state-controlled mining investment company, ZCCM Investments Holdings Plc, agreed to sell a majority stake in a lime and cement venture to a privately held Chinese company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Son of Slain Communist Rattles Investors Ahead of Colombian Vote
top_signals.summary: The son of a slain communist leader is rattling markets ahead of Colombia’s presidential election, as investors weigh whether he can win — and how radically he would govern if he does.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: American Airlines picks SpaceX's Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi on more than 500 planes
top_signals.summary: American Airlines said it will install SpaceX's Starlink for inflight Wi-Fi on more than 500 of its airplanes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Asia-Pacific markets trade mixed as investors weigh Iran tensions and ceasefire talks - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Asia-Pacific markets trade mixed as investors weigh Iran tensions and ceasefire talks  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
